name: pet-context-companion
description: Install, launch, update, and troubleshoot the local Codex pet usage overlay.

interface.shortDescription: Install and control the Codex pet usage overlay.
interface.longDescription: Installs and launches the local Pet Context Companion overlay, updates it from GitHub, and checks its setup across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
defaultPrompt: Start Pet Context Companion beside my Codex pet.
Update Pet Context Companion and launch it.
Check my Pet Context Companion installation.
